login.invalid: Token rejected. Double-check the startup log.

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.subtitle: Hot-reload runs the same teardown / respawn dance as the server's auto-recovery path.
plugins.name: Name

threads.title: Threads
threads.empty_messages: No messages on this thread yet.

approvals.title: Approval decisions
approvals.subtitle: Persisted (tenant, project, tool, input) rules. Delete to re-prompt next turn.

schedules.title: Scheduled tasks
schedules.subtitle: Time- or interval-based proactive prompt injection. Disable rather than delete if you may want it back.

outbox.title: Outbox
outbox.subtitle: Durable queue for outbound IM deliveries. Force-retry a failed row to re-claim immediately.

system.title: System
system.subtitle: Edit snaca.toml directly. The server validates before saving; restart applies changes.
system.core_desc: HTTP listener, data directory, tenant, and shared skills directory.
system.llm_desc: Provider, model, API key, and WebSearch key.
system.engine_desc: Turn limits, context, timeout, concurrency, and memory settings.
system.admin_desc: Web admin switch, bearer token, and development CORS origins.
system.plugins_config_desc: Configure IM channel plugin subprocesses. Restart to start, stop, or change plugins.
system.mcp_config_desc: Configure MCP servers available to the agent. Restart to apply changes.
system.full_toml_desc: Edit plugins, MCP servers, and advanced settings directly here.
system.no_plugins_configured: No plugins configured. Add one here or edit [[plugins]] in the TOML panel.
system.no_mcp_configured: No MCP servers configured. Add one here or edit [[mcp]] in the TOML panel.
system.name: Name
system.saved_restart: Configuration saved. Restart snaca-server to apply it.
system.shutdown_confirm: Request snaca-server to exit? If systemd/docker manages it, the supervisor can restart it with the new config.
system.shutdown_requested: snaca-server shutdown requested. Wait for the supervisor to restart it, then refresh.
system.system_prompt_ph: Leave empty to use the built-in default prompt
system.compaction_desc: When and how thread history is summarised to fit the context window.
system.memory_desc: Vector recall, the post-turn extractor, and the rerank pass.

help.http_listen: host:port for the admin/health HTTP listener. Default 127.0.0.1:8080.
help.data_root: Where per-tenant workspaces, memory, and state.sqlite live. Relative paths resolve against the config file; ${VAR} is expanded.
help.tenant_id: Static tenant id used for every IM event (single-tenant in M1).
help.skills_global_dir: Optional directory of *.md skills loaded into every project at lowest priority. Leave empty to disable.
help.typing_update_interval_ms: Min delay between typing message.update RPCs per turn. 0 disables throttling. Default 200.
help.mcp_idle_ttl_secs: Evict a cached MCP child after this many idle seconds. 0 keeps them until shutdown. Default 600.
help.mcp_reaper_period_secs: How often the reaper sweeps idle MCP children. 0 disables it. Default 60.
help.model: Model id, e.g. deepseek-chat or claude-sonnet-4-6.
help.api_key: LLM API key. Use ${VAR} to read from the environment at startup.
help.base_url: Override the provider base URL. Leave empty for the provider default.
help.timeout_secs: Max wait for one LLM round trip, in seconds.
help.tavily_api_key: Tavily key for the WebSearch tool. Accepts a literal or ${VAR}; exported as TAVILY_API_KEY.
help.retry_max_attempts: Total attempts per round trip before surfacing the error. 1 disables retry. Default 5.
help.retry_base_delay_ms: First backoff before the second attempt; doubles each retry. Default 500.
help.retry_max_delay_secs: Cap on each backoff sleep (also caps provider Retry-After). Default 30.
help.retry_jitter_ratio: Uniform jitter added on top of backoff. 0.5 = up to 50%. Default 0.5.
help.max_iterations: Max tool-use iterations the engine runs in one turn.
help.max_tokens: Max output tokens requested per LLM call.
help.history_limit: Max messages loaded into a turn's context.
help.history_max_bytes: Last-resort byte cap on loaded history. Default 1.5 MiB (1572864).
help.turn_timeout_secs: Wall-clock cap on one turn. Empty = no global timeout.
help.concurrent_tool_limit: Max read-only tool calls run in parallel per batch. 1 disables concurrency. Default 5.
help.collapse_tool_results_threshold: Collapse old read-only tool results larger than this (bytes) in history. 0 disables. Default 1024.
help.loop_guard_max_repeats: Abort the turn after the same (tool,input) repeats this many times. 0 disables. Default 3.
help.malformed_tool_args_max_retries: Per-turn retries when the model emits invalid tool-args JSON. 0 surfaces immediately. Default 2.
help.stream_interrupted_max_retries: Retries for an LLM stream that disconnects mid-response. 0 surfaces immediately. Default 2.
help.max_output_token_escalation_attempts: Retries that double the output cap after MaxTokens with no tool_use. 0 disables. Default 2.
help.max_output_token_ceiling: Hard ceiling on the post-escalation output cap. Default 32768.
help.stream_tool_execution: Pre-execute read-only tools while the response still streams. Default on.
help.system_prompt: Override the built-in system prompt. Empty = use the default.
help.compact_after_input_tokens: Compact a thread once one round trip's input exceeds this. Empty/0 disables auto-compaction.
help.compact_keep_recent: Keep this many most-recent messages verbatim when compacting. Default 6.
help.protect_first_n: Keep this many oldest messages verbatim across compactions. Default 4.
help.compact_max_retries: Bound on the per-turn shrink-retry loop on context overflow. Default 3.
help.compact_summary_max_tokens: Cap on the summariser's output tokens. Default 2048.
help.memory_embedder: Vector recall backend: none (off), hash (dev stub), or fastembed (real ONNX).
help.memory_embedder_dim: Hash embedder dimensionality. Only used when embedder = hash. Default 128.
help.memory_extractor_model: Model for post-turn memory extraction. Empty = use llm.model.
help.memory_reranker_model: Model for the rerank pass. Empty = use llm.model.
help.recall_confidence_floor: Drop recalled entries below cosine × confidence. Default 0.30.
help.extractor_default_confidence: Confidence applied to extractor proposals that omit it. Default 0.6.
help.memory_extractor: Mine user/feedback memories from each successful turn. Default on.
help.memory_reranker: Add an LLM rerank pass between cosine recall and the prompt splice. Default off (extra LLM call).
help.memory_extractor_no_filter: Disable the extractor's sensitive-info filter. Leave off unless PII is filtered elsewhere.
help.admin_enabled: Master switch for /api/v1/* and this admin SPA. Restart required.
help.admin_token: Bearer token for /api/v1/*. Auto-generated on first start if empty. Changing it logs you out.
help.cors_origins: Allowed CORS origins for the API (e.g. the Vite dev server). One per line.
help.logging_filter: EnvFilter directive (RUST_LOG grammar). RUST_LOG wins if set.
help.logging_file: Redirect logs to this file with rotation. Empty = log to stderr.
help.logging_max_size_mb: Rotate the log file past this many MiB. Default 50. Ignored without a log file.
help.logging_max_files: Rotated archives kept on disk. Default 10. Ignored without a log file.
help.transport: stdio spawns command as a child; http points at a remote URL.
help.mcp_command: Executable for stdio transport (ignored for http). Supports ${VAR}.
help.plugin_command: Executable to spawn as the IM-channel plugin. Supports ${VAR}; pass an absolute path or rely on PATH.
help.cwd: Working directory. Relative paths resolve against the config file; ${VAR} is expanded.
help.init_timeout_secs: MCP initialization timeout in seconds. Default 30.
help.call_timeout_secs: Per-tools/call timeout for this server. Empty = client default (60s).
help.args_lines: CLI arguments, one per line. Each supports ${VAR}.
help.env_lines: Environment variables as KEY=value, one per line. Values support ${VAR}.

system.restart_pending: Saved config differs from the running server — restart to apply it.
